description_long: This is a military-style helicopter with a streamlined fuselage painted in a tan and brown camouflage pattern, suitable for blending into arid or urban environments. The helicopter features a large, dark-tinted cockpit window that wraps around the front, providing wide visibility for the pilot and co-pilot. It is equipped with a single main rotor with four long, black blades tipped with yellow, and a smaller tail rotor at the rear for stability. The landing gear consists of two sturdy black skids with crossbars for support, designed for stable ground contact. Visible under the wings are mounted armaments, likely missiles or rockets, indicating a combat or tactical role. The helicopter also displays a round insignia on the tail boom, but no visible registration number.
description: A tan and brown camouflaged military helicopter with a large tinted cockpit window, black skids, and visible underwing armaments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, dark cockpit window, symmetrical skids, and the main rotor blades extending horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the camouflage pattern, cockpit window, landing skids, and underwing armaments.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full span of the main rotor blades, tail rotor, and the arrangement of armaments beneath the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the camouflage, cockpit window, skids, and insignia on the tail boom.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored black with yellow tips, each blade approximately 5.5 meters in length.
attribute_tail_rotor: A two-blade tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, colored black with yellow tips, no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel black landing skids made of metal or composite, connected by crossbars, with a simple, robust design for stable landings.
attribute_cockpit_windows: One large, wraparound cockpit window with a dark tint, covering the front and partially the sides, framed in black with no visible markings.
